features.name: Authentication & User Profile
features.description: User sign-in, session handling, profile display, and Supabase-backed user data.

features.name: Home View & Entry Points
features.description: Landing experience with scan entry points, plant doctor shortcut, weekly stats, and recent scans carousel.

features.name: Camera Capture & Upload
features.description: Camera access, capture flow, gallery upload, and diagnostic/identify mode handling.

features.name: AI Plant Identification
features.description: Gemini-based plant identification and diagnosis including image compression and API integration.

features.name: Analyzing & Loading Experience
features.description: Full-screen analyzing state with rotating loading messages and animated progress for scans.

features.name: Plant Result & Diagnosis View
features.description: Rich result screen with identification details, health assessment, care info, similar plants, share and report actions.

features.name: Collection Management
features.description: Save, list, and view plant collection items backed by Supabase tables.

features.name: Scan History & Explore View
features.description: Display scan history and allow navigation into detailed plant results.

features.name: Community & Assistant Views
features.description: Community feed shell and AI assistant experience for plant-related help.

features.name: Profile & Settings
features.description: User profile display, collection stats, and dark mode toggle.

features.name: Navigation Layout
features.description: Bottom navigation bar and high-level routing between primary views.

features.name: AR & Tools & Guides Shell
features.description: Placeholder AR view and utility views for tools, guides, and consultations.
